name: Meteogram Card
description: Scrollable weather meteogram using MET Norway Locationforecast API

latitude.description: Latitude for forecast (defaults to Home Assistant config)

longitude.description: Longitude for forecast (defaults to Home Assistant config)

days.description: Optional cap on forecast days to show. Omit to show MET's full available range (~10 days: hourly then 6-hourly)

proxy_url.description: Required: base path of a proxy that forwards to api.met.no with the MET User-Agent header. Use the relative path /met (same-origin, recommended). The card appends the locationforecast path and coordinates.
